name_en: Original Miu Miu 5BB142 New Bowling Bag, a main item on the official website, an absolutely explosive style this year 🔥. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern. The bag is exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured. The front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap. Cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers are wearing this style. Size: 22X10.5X7.5Cm, with original packaging
